data.title: "Spanish Mountain Gold reports successful AGM with approval of all business matters by shareholders"
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd. (TSX-V: SPA) (FSE: S3Y) (OTCQB: SPAUF) disclosed outcomes from its Annual General Meeting of shareholders on August 21, 2025. Shareholders approved all agenda items from the Company’s management information circular. The Board of Directors, comprising Brent Bergeron, Peter Mah, Lembit Janes, and Richard Orazietti, was ratified during the meeting.

data.title: Celeb accounts like Adele, Future, & Michael Jackson's hacked for crypto scam Thursday promoting a Solana meme coin scheme.
data.description: On Thursday, the social media accounts of several celebrities were compromised once more to advertise a suspected pump-and-dump scheme involving the Solana meme coin.

data.title: Global Technologies, LTD creates GTLL Advisory Group, LLC to enhance health and wellness advisory services, boosting innovation in the sector.
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on August 22, 2025, Global Technologies, LTD (OTCPK: GTLL), a publicly traded company, specializing in health and wellness innovation, announced a strategic update. This update follows noteworthy modifications to its operational framework and portfolio.

data.title: Luca Netz discusses Pudgy Penguins growth strategy in bull market 2025, emphasizing Web3 trends, crypto firms and big-brand partnerships.
data.description: Luca Netz, the CEO of Igloo Inc., delved into Pudgy Penguins' strategies for expanding its brand and business to capitalize on the flourishing bull market of 2025. Netz highlighted the company's focus on enhancing access to capital while navigating various trends in Web3. These trends encompass crypto treasury companies, tokenized stocks, and the renewed interest in forming partnerships with notable sports and established brands.

data.title: Kootenay Silver adds CPA Ron Miller to Board; brings 30 yrs of experience. Stock (TSXV: KTN) (OTCQX: KOOYF) mentioned.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on August 22, 2025, Kootenay Silver Inc. has appointed Ron Miller as a director. Kootenay Silver Inc. (TSXV: KTN) (OTCQX: KOOYF) welcomed Mr. Miller, a CPA, CA with 30+ years in public practice, to their team.

data.title: Kinetic offers $10,000 reward for info on copper theft in North Carolina.
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina as of August 22, 2025, Kinetic, a provider of fiber internet for residential and business purposes, has announced a reward of $10,000. This reward is being offered in exchange for any information that can lead to the apprehension and subsequent conviction of individuals involved in the theft or damage of the company's copper and fiber infrastructure within the state.

data.title: Commercial National Financial Corp will pay a 14 cent quarterly dividend, yielding 4.96%, on Oct 1, 2025. Board declared on Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: In ITHACA, Michigan on August 22, 2025, Commercial National Financial Corporation (OTCID: CEFC) revealed a standard quarterly cash dividend of 14 cents per share. This dividend will be distributed on October 1, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as of September 19, 2025. With a recent closing price noted at $11.30 per share, this translates to an annualized dividend yield of 4.96%.

data.title: Cardano aims for $1.05-$1.18 with 25% upside from $0.92, according to technical breakout signals.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a bullish trend for ADA with a target range of $1.05 to $1.18. Current technical indicators suggest an upside potential of 25% from the current level of $0.92. Traders and investors are closely monitoring these indicators for potential gains in the near future.

data.description: On Friday, Ethereum almost reached its all-time high price, leading to the liquidation of $259 million in short positions of ETH.

data.title: Cryptos surge after Powell speech; Bitcoin at $117,071.34, Ethereum $4,772.59, XRP $3.05, Dogecoin $0.2372; +151,561 traders liquidated = $635.67M loss, $194.3M outflows from Bitcoin ETFs, $287.6M inflows for Ethereum ETFs. Top gainers: Morpho, Aerodrome, Ethereum Classic.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies surged following Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's allusion to potential interest rate cuts in September, sparking positivity across digital assets. Key prices include Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $117,071.34, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $4,772.59, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $196.27, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $3.05, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.2372, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.00001327. Coinglass data indicated that 151,561 traders faced liquidation in the recent 24 hours, totaling $635.67 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data revealed $194.3 million in net outflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs on Wednesday, while spot Ethereum ETFs witnessed net inflows of $287.6 million. Top gainers in the last day were Morpho (CRYPTO: MORPHO), Aerodrome Finance (CRYPTO: AERO), and Ethereum Classic (CRYPTO: ETC). Noteworthy developments included Ethereum traders considering 'Swing Longs' due to ETH outperforming BTC. Dormant Bitcoin whales were observed rotating assets into other cryptocurrencies. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
XRP expected to reach $4.00-$6.00 by August 2025, despite mixed signals. Analysts remain bullish amid market volatility.
Senator Mark Warner States That The Firing Of The Head Of The U.S. Military Intelligence Agency Is An Example Of Using Intelligence As A Loyalty Test.

data.title: Inventor from Sun City Center, Fla. develops RV Ladder Safety Rail Extender (TLS-879) to improve RV ladder safety.
data.description: A resident of Sun City Center, Florida had the idea to enhance standard RV ladders, leading to the creation of the RV Ladder Safety Rail Extender. The inventor aimed to improve safety for campers using mounted RV ladders. This innovative design offers a secure and efficient way to prevent accidents with RV ladders. The invention was developed in response to the inventor's belief that existing RV ladders could be optimized for safety. The product was announced in Pittsburgh on August 22, 2025.
